title: Luis Roberts
extract:
Luis Roberts (born 24 March 2002) is a Wales international rugby league footballer who plays as a centre or winger for the Midlands Hurricanes in the RFL Championship.
He previously played for  Salford Red Devils and Leeds Rhinos  in the Super League; and  Swinton Lions, Leigh Centurions, Widnes Vikings,  and Bradford Bulls in the RFL Championship.
